title: Shared board without branding Monday.com
excerpt:

posts.author: m.zanjani (MajidZanjani)
posts.cookedHtml:
I believe that Monday.com branding shouldn’t be bold on a paid account.
Please provide a way to REMOVE the “Get started with your own board sign up” ﻿notice on the top right hand corner of shared pages. This is very distracting to our customers, who are trying to read our data.
